name: skill-frontmatter
assertion: SKILL.md exists with name: documenso and a trigger-optimized description

name: env-checker-runs
assertion: node .agent/skills/documenso/scripts/check-documenso-env.mjs runs and never prints an actual secret value, only presence/absence

name: no-untested-claim
assertion: The skill does not imply the Documenso HTTP routes, webhook verification, or the Documenso-side SSO handshake are test-covered — they are not

name: signature-field-coupling-documented
assertion: The skill documents that SIGNATURE_FIELD in letterhead.mjs must be updated in lockstep with the letterhead PDF layout
